public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quartermaster.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a quartermaster still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quartermaster in and around Maskscar Plaza District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Maskscar Plaza District workable through the obligations of quartermaster while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry over symbolism in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Maskscar Plaza District, that usually means carrying house rivalry over symbolism, crowd control, heat damage to stored materials without letting the role of quartermaster visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vessa Cindercrest can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Vessa Cindercrest will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Vessa Cindercrest read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Maskscar Plaza District, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Rebuilding Oath Courts, Great House Citadel Circle.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Maskscar Plaza District: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

first_impression: Vessa Cindercrest presents as Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a quartermaster still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Quartermaster, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Psanan.
what_they_refuse: Vessa Cindercrest refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Quartermaster too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vessa Cindercrest can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vessa Cindercrest adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vessa Cindercrest is Known locally through day-to-day work as quartermaster. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Quartermaster.
